message:
fix(engine): fix 6 pipeline execution bugs — E2E pass rate 1/21 → 13/14

Root cause analysis and fixes for the execution pipeline that prevented
most JS programs from producing correct results through frankenctl run:

1. Completion value: Pop handler now updates register 0 so expression
   statement values reach the script completion register
2. Call classification: Ir1Op::Call reclassified from HostcallEffect to
   Pure so function calls execute through proper call frames instead of
   being hijacked by IFC HostCall dispatch
3. Parser statement splitting: split_statement_segments now splits after
   } when a block-keyword segment (function/if/for/while/do/try/switch)
   ends, with continuation-keyword exclusions (else/catch/finally/while)
4. Ternary control flow: both branches store to a shared temporary
   binding so the merge point reads the correct branch result
5. Module-level Return: always uses register 0 (completion value)
   instead of stale value_stack register after control flow
6. Deferred function loop: index-based iteration to allow nested
   function discovery; terminal_halt invariant relaxed for modules
   with deferred function bodies appended after Halt

Also fixes pre-existing variable-name typos in migration_kit.rs and
frankenlab_harness_migration.rs, and extra closing braces in
migration_kit.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
